# zachy.cc

> Personal portfolio site for zoop — cool things for the web. Cloudflare glazer, WebGL enjoyer.
> Site: https://zachy.cc

## About

zoop builds weird, fast, interactive things for the web: real-time WebGL, shaders, tools, and apps. The site is a vanilla JS single-page app with no framework, deployed on Cloudflare Pages with a Functions backend. Content is served from hardcoded defaults with live overrides from Cloudflare KV.

## Routes

- / (home — giant stacked nav: Work, News, About, Stack, Contact)
- /work (project list with expandable details)
- /news (announcements and releases)
- /about (bio)
- /stack (tech stack badges)
- /contact (email + socials)
- /privacy (privacy policy)
- /terms (terms — mostly a joke)

## Projects

- b3am — end-to-end encrypted messenger PWA (Durable Objects, AES-GCM)
- drop — encrypted no-account file transfer (Workers, D1, R2) — https://drop.zachy.cc
- Pulse — privacy-first health app for Android (Kotlin)
- Foyer — config-driven framework running a family of sites (Node, Cloudflare)
- Taskly — minimal task manager (Vite, Pages)

## Contact

- Email: hi@zachy.cc
- GitHub: https://github.com/zoop-dev
- Signal: https://signal.me/#eu/eL1c4KuBK_cDlAsJaPxEpg1tXwr1RQUW8BNGstxGpVKsyEYUssFJX4q7L1VVuPD7

## Tech

- Frontend: vanilla JS, Vite, tippy.js, simple-icons
- Backend: Cloudflare Pages Functions, Workers KV, D1
- Link shortener: lnk.zachy.cc (D1-backed)
- Deploy: Cloudflare Pages
